# Robots.txt for Infernal Social

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /payment-success/
Disallow:  /payment-cancel/
Disallow: /settings/
Disallow: /messages/
Disallow: /notifications/

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://infernalsocial.com/sitemap. xml

# Crawl delay (optional - prevents aggressive crawling)
Crawl-delay: 1
